name: Roger Kellaway
abstract: Roger Kellaway (born November 1, 1939) is an American composer, arranger and jazz pianist, who has recorded over 250 albums, and composed over 20 film scores. He is a Grammy Award winner and an Academy Award nominee.

interviews.title: Roger Kellaway interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 14, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Junior Mance Part I
about_quotes.evidence: tour that is called “100 Gold Fingers,” it features ten piano players — ... Roger Kellaway, and who have I left out, oh, Cedar Walton and myself.
about_quotes.doc_title: Junior Mance Part I interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, New York City, New York, July 27, 1995 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Frishberg
about_quotes.evidence: I held, along with other piano players, Ross Tompkins and Roger Kellaway and I maybe, were the three players that were used as house players.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Frishberg interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 16, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Dick Hyman
about_quotes.evidence: We have an unreleased record that we did and it’s terrific. It’s really very good, that we made in The Bakery last year in L.A.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dick Hyman interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 17, 2001 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Magnusson
about_quotes.evidence: Yeah I love working with Roger Kellaway and John Guerin. We’ve been trying to do something as a trio.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bob Magnusson interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Denny Zeitlin
about_quotes.evidence: here I have to really thank Roger Kellaway... So it ended up Roger conducted the orchestra for me
about_quotes.doc_title: Denny Zeitlin interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Francisco, California, August 8, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Sheldon
about_quotes.evidence: I worked with him and Roger Kellaway. We did the Film Institute Award for his father
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Sheldon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
